title: SUNCO UI-SPEC SPEC-BLOCK
description: Schema for the YAML SPEC-BLOCK fenced inside UI-SPEC.md produced by ui-phase-web (Phase 40/M2.3). Per spec R2 (SUNCO:SPEC-BLOCK deterministic extraction) and §12 BS1 (schema versioning — version: 1 const). Lenient additive: the 12 Phase-40 content fields are required plus the BS1 version meta-field (13 required total); additionalProperties permitted so downstream phases (Phase 41 ui-review, Phase 48 cross-domain) may extend without a schema bump. BS1 version field backfilled post-Phase-47 (2026-04-19) to align with api/data/event/ops schemas shipped in Phase 45/46.

version.description: Schema version per §12 BS1. Constant 1 for Phase 40 output. Future schema bumps increment this and ship coordinated schema migrations (same discipline as api/data/event/ops schemas).

layout.description: High-level layout intent: structure, grid, page regions. Prose or structured; lenient.

components.description: Component inventory with purpose and core props/variants.

states.description: Screen/component states (default, loading, empty, error, success, etc.).

a11y.description: Accessibility requirements (WCAG level, keyboard nav, ARIA, reduced motion).

responsive.description: Responsive breakpoints and behavior per range.

motion.description: Motion and animation guidance (entrances, exits, feedback, reduced-motion).

copy.description: UX writing guidelines — tone, voice, key messages, empty/error copy.

anti_pattern_watchlist.description: Impeccable anti-patterns the implementation must avoid. Done-when (Phase 40) requires at least 3 entries.

design_system_tokens_used.description: Design-system tokens consumed (color, space, radius, typography scale, motion).

endpoints_consumed.description: API endpoints the UI reads from or writes to.

error_states_handled.description: Enumerated error conditions the UI handles (network, auth, validation, not-found, etc.).
